title: Brothers in Arms: Road to Hill 30™

notes: The game runs flawless and without any issues. i highly recommend increasing the FOV via the game's config files to make the game more playable on modern wide and ultra wide screens (Check for a guide online, user game config is located in steamapps/compatdata/15190/drive_c/users/steamuser/applicationdata/Gearbox software).
title: Brothers in Arms: Road to Hill 30™
